channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 10: Netherlands thrash Sweden, Japan eliminate Tunisia
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: US and Iran face make-or-break talks in Switzerland
item.description: Iranian and US officials are set for high stakes talks in Switzerland to reinforce the Memorandum of Understanding.

item.title: Vance arrives in Switzerland for US-Iran talks
item.description: Both nations seek a durable end to their war as Iran slams Israeli attacks on Lebanon as violations of interim deal.

item.title: Iran war day 114: US, Iranian delegations in Switzerland for key talks
item.description: Lebanon to top the agenda as US and Iran to hold talks in Switzerland’s Burgenstock mediated by Qatar and Pakistan.

item.title: Ueda’s brace helps Japan knock Tunisia out of World Cup 2026
item.description: Two goals from Ayase Ueda, and one each from Daichi Kamada and Junya Ito, keep Asian giants Japan second in Group F.

item.title: Trump official says Iran World Cup visa approval ‘amazing’
item.description: The chief of the White House World Cup task force says it’s “pretty amazing” Iran’s football team has been given visas.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: South Africa’s immigration crackdown divides Johannesburg’s inner city
item.description: A government push to curb undocumented employment is exposing the dependence of many small businesses on migrant labour.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in targeted Israeli strike
item.description: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in targeted Israeli strike

item.title: Egypt coach denies Salah rift before World Cup match against New Zealand
item.description: 'If he starts ... or if he gets substituted, it's fine - it is his role as a player,' Egypt ‌coach Hossam Hassan says.

item.title: Room the hero as tiny Curacao earn first World Cup point against Ecuador
item.description: Eloy Room's incredible goalkeeping helped Curacao make history in a goalless draw in a Group E match in Kansas City.

item.title: Suspect arrested after anti-Muslim stabbing rampage in Scotland
item.description: Bystanders captured the moment police arrested a machete-weilding man, suspected of anti-Muslim stabbing rampage.

item.title: Iran war live: US, Tehran set to hold high-level talks in Switzerland
item.description: Talks come as Iran says it is closing the Strait of Hormuz over Israel's deadly attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: US refuses to ease Iran World Cup travel restrictions for Belgium match
item.description: Andrew Giuliani says Iran's players will not be allowed to stay longer for their group matches in the US.

item.title: Iranian delegation arrives in Switzerland for US peace talks
item.description: Iranian delegation arrives in Switzerland for US peace talks

item.title: Undav injury-time goal sees Germany beat Ivory Coast to top World Cup group
item.description: Germany come from behind to beat Ivory Coast 2-1 in Group E, sealing FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout place.

item.title: Trump vows Iran will not charge Strait of Hormuz tolls, but says US might
item.description: The US-Iran memorandum of understanding does not rule out future tolls in the strait after an initial 60-day period.

item.title: Uncertain World Cup for Paraguay’s Almiron, sent off for covering his mouth
item.description: Almiron received the first red card for covering his mouth in the World Cup Group D match against Turkiye.

item.title: Bolivia declares state of emergency to clear protest blockades
item.description: Bolivia declares state of emergency to clear protest blockades

item.title: Overplaying Strait of Hormuz card will turn Iran into a pariah state
item.description: Overplaying Strait of Hormuz card will turn Iran into a pariah state.

item.title: Netherlands vs Sweden: Gakpo, Brobbey doubles give Dutch 5–1 World Cup win
item.description: The Dutch have four points after bagging their first win in Houston; Sweden are second with three points in Group F.

item.title: Ukraine says Russian attack kills five people in Zaporizhzhia
item.description: During nightly address, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy warns that Russia is preparing for 'massive' attack.

item.title: Are UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s political days numbered?
item.description: British PM resisting intensifying party pressure to step aside.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in Israeli attack in Gaza
item.description: Al Jazeera condemned Israel's 'deliberate' targeting of Wishah, the network's 12th media worker killed during Gaza war.

item.title: US-Iran talks to kick off Sunday in Switzerland, says Pakistan
item.description: Planned negotiations come amid tensions over Israeli attacks in Lebanon and Iran’s announced closure of Hormuz again.
